name: Vegetable Burger (from My Garden)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the onion in butter until translucent.
2. Add the celery and carrot to the skillet. Cook until the vegetables are soft.
3. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
4. Mix in the remaining ingredients: ground walnuts or pecans, seasoned bread crumbs, cooked rice, eggs, salt, and pepper.
5. Form the mixture into patties.
6. Broil the patties until they begin to brown.
